title: The Arena – AI Music & Video Social Platform

requirements.text: Create a Motoko backend actor that stores user-uploaded content metadata, including: title, description, file type (mp3, wav, video), file data as Blob, album cover image Blob (optional), thumbnail image Blob (optional), uploader principal, upload timestamp, and like/comment counts. Expose update calls for uploading content and query calls for fetching the feed, fetching a single post, and fetching posts by a specific user.

quotes: upload any file mp3 and wav
option to upload album cover and create thumbnail

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores title, description, fileType, fileBlob, albumCoverBlob, thumbnailBlob, uploaderPrincipal, timestamp, likesCount, commentsCount per post
uploadContent update call accepts all metadata fields and returns a post ID
getFeed query returns a paginated array of post metadata (without full blob data for listing efficiency)
getPost query returns full post data including blobs by ID
getUserPosts query returns posts filtered by principal

requirements.text: Build a content upload flow that supports MP3, WAV, and common video formats (MP4, WebM, MOV). The upload UI must work responsively on both mobile and desktop. Users must be able to: select an audio or video file, optionally upload an album cover image, and optionally create or upload a thumbnail. All file reading should happen client-side before sending to the backend.

quotes: upload any file mp3 and wav for any device
option to upload album cover and create thumbnail

acceptanceCriteria: File picker accepts .mp3, .wav, .mp4, .webm, .mov extensions
Album cover upload field accepts image files (PNG, JPG, WebP)
Thumbnail section allows either uploading an image or capturing a frame from a video preview
Upload form renders correctly on mobile viewport (≤ 768px) and desktop
File content is converted to a Uint8Array/Blob and submitted to the backend uploadContent call

requirements.text: Create a social media discovery feed page that displays uploaded AI music and video content as cards. Each card must show the thumbnail or album cover, title, uploader name (derived from principal), file type badge, and like count. Clicking a card opens a detail/player view where audio and video files can be played directly in the browser.

quotes: social media platform for ai music and video content

acceptanceCriteria: Feed page renders a responsive grid of content cards
Each card displays thumbnail/album cover, title, uploader, file type badge, and like count
Audio files render an HTML5 audio player on the detail page
Video files render an HTML5 video player on the detail page
Detail page displays album cover for audio tracks alongside the player

requirements.text: Implement a thumbnail creation tool in the upload flow. For video uploads, display a scrubber that lets the user seek through a video preview and capture a specific frame as the thumbnail. For audio uploads, allow the user to upload a custom image as the thumbnail/album cover. The generated or selected thumbnail should be previewed before submission.
acceptanceCriteria: Video upload shows a video preview with a time scrubber
A 'Capture Frame' button exports the current video frame as a PNG thumbnail using a canvas element
Captured thumbnail is shown as a preview image before the user submits the form
Audio upload shows an image upload field labeled 'Thumbnail / Album Cover'
Selected/captured thumbnail image is included in the backend upload call

requirements.text: Apply a bold, dark arena-style visual theme throughout the application. Use a dark charcoal/near-black background, vivid neon accent colors (e.g., electric gold or neon orange), strong typographic hierarchy with a modern sans-serif font, and glowing card hover effects. The aesthetic should feel like a high-energy performance stage or music venue, consistent across all pages and components.
acceptanceCriteria: Global background is dark (charcoal or near-black)
Primary accent color is a vivid neon gold or orange applied to buttons, badges, and highlights
Cards have a subtle glow or border effect on hover
Typography uses a bold, modern sans-serif font
Theme is consistent across the feed, upload, and detail pages

constraints: App name must display as 'The Arena' in all user-facing UI
Do not use any external storage or cloud services — all file blobs must be stored in the Motoko backend canister
Do not integrate third-party authentication — use Internet Identity if login is needed
All file reading and thumbnail generation must happen client-side
nonGoals: Real-time features such as live streaming or WebSocket-based notifications
Direct messaging or chat between users
AI generation of music or video within the app

required: Dark arena stage wordmark logo with bold glowing lettering and a spotlight or stage motif (arena-logo.dim_400x120.png)
Abstract dark background with subtle neon light rays and crowd silhouette for hero/landing sections (arena-hero-bg.dim_1440x600.png)
Default placeholder thumbnail for audio tracks — dark music note icon on deep charcoal (default-audio-thumb.dim_400x400.png)
Default placeholder thumbnail for video content — dark play button icon on deep charcoal (default-video-thumb.dim_400x400.png)
